description: Seed benchmark tasks drawn from the checked Parley examples. These are the Parley side of the Phase 1 corpus; Python and Rust equivalents are still required before paper claims.

tasks.title: Hello and interpolation
tasks.summary: Print a greeting and a simple arithmetic result using interpolation.

tasks.title: FizzBuzz
tasks.summary: Print 1 through 20 with Fizz, Buzz, and FizzBuzz substitutions.

tasks.title: Records and changing parameters
tasks.summary: Define records, compute rectangle area, and mutate a point through a changing parameter.

tasks.title: Enums and when branching
tasks.summary: Define a finite kind and branch over variants with exhaustive and otherwise arms.

tasks.title: Lists and maps
tasks.summary: Use lists, sorted iteration, maps, key lookup, and joined text output.

tasks.title: Function values
tasks.summary: Pass named functions as first-class values and call them through function-typed parameters.

tasks.title: File statistics
tasks.summary: Write a small file, read it back, split lines, and report matching content.

tasks.title: Chatty calculator
tasks.summary: Read two numbers and an operator, then perform decimal arithmetic with caught runtime errors.

tasks.title: Guessing game
tasks.summary: Loop over numeric input until the random secret is guessed.

tasks.title: Todo list
tasks.summary: Drive a small todo list through text commands, list mutation, and recoverable errors.
tasks.stdin_fixture:
add buy milk
add walk dog
list
done 1
quit
